nodes.label: Static Hydration Support for Web
nodes.rationale: Re-calculates color scheme on client-side for web to prevent hydration mismatch errors during static rendering.

nodes.label: Theme Preference Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Supports persistent theme preferences (light, dark, system) saved via AsyncStorage and evaluated based on React Native's useColorScheme.

nodes.label: In-App Browser Navigation
nodes.rationale: Opens external links in an in-app browser using expo-web-browser to prevent layout context switching on native devices.

nodes.label: Expo v55 compliance
nodes.rationale: Enforces alignment with Expo version 55.0.0 documentation to avoid breaking changes or deprecations.
